args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting — coordinate development kickoff
args.body:
Hi David,

Following the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): Please coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project. Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please do the following:
1) Confirm resource availability with the development leads.
2) Create a short kickoff plan with initial milestones and tasks.
3) Schedule and invite the team to the first development kickoff meeting.

Reply to confirm you've started and share the kickoff plan and meeting time by the deadline.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting — send agenda to John Mitchell
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Following the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): Please email the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

When you send it, please:
1) Attach the meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx file.
2) Include a short message asking John for any feedback by the deadline.
3) CC me on the message so I can track responses.

Please confirm when you've sent it.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action Item from Team Meeting — review sales projections
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Following the Team Meeting Minutes (May 17, 2024): Please review the sales projections and provide feedback. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Specifically, please:
1) Review the projection assumptions and numbers.
2) Highlight any risks, gaps, or questionable assumptions.
3) Suggest adjustments or actions to improve accuracy.

Please send your feedback as comments on the projections or as a short summary email by the deadline.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
